items.title: Show HN: Shadow Web – Cut 64–97% of web page tokens for LLM agents
items.why_it_matters: Shadow Web is an open-source tool designed to strip 64% to 97% of web page tokens before feeding them to LLMs. Since you are building AI-ingest to filter news, scraping web pages can quickly bloat your token usage and API costs. Clone this repository today and integrate its parser into your AI-ingest backend to clean up scraped articles before sending them to Claude, instantly cutting down your API bill.

items.title: Choosing a Claude model and effort level in Claude Code
items.why_it_matters: Anthropic has updated Claude Code to allow developers to explicitly choose their model and set 'effort levels' for reasoning. This gives you direct control over how many tokens Claude burns through when writing and refactoring code. Open your terminal, run `claude config`, and set a lower effort level or switch to Haiku for simple UI tweaks on your Next.js frontend to keep your development costs near zero this week.

items.title: Show HN: Backlog – tasks and contexts manager for AI coding agents
items.why_it_matters: Backlog is a new open-source task and context manager designed specifically for AI coding agents. Since your goal is to get better at directing AI and managing what to keep or throw away, this tool helps you organize tasks so your AI agent doesn't lose track. Install Backlog in your AI-ingest repository today to map out your next three shipping milestones and keep Claude Code focused on completing them.

items.title: Show HN: Fortress – a stealth Chromium so your agents stop getting blocked
items.why_it_matters: Fortress is an open-source, stealth Chromium browser designed to prevent AI scrapers from getting blocked by Cloudflare and other bot-detection walls. If your AI-ingest tool is struggling to scrape Twitter or news sites due to rate limits or blocks, this solves it. Download the Fortress binary this week and configure your scraping script to run through it to ensure uninterrupted data ingestion.

items.title: Show HN: Rowboat – Open-source, local-first alternative to Claude Desktop
items.why_it_matters: Rowboat is an open-source, local-first alternative to Claude Desktop that lets you build custom work surfaces and manage local context more cleanly than a standard chat window. If you find yourself drowning in long chat threads while debugging your Next.js and Supabase setup, this gives you a more structured workspace. Clone the Rowboat repository today and run it locally to manage your AI-ingest codebase prompts.
